flavourText: Deep beneath the Earth's crust, the Plate Shifter rumbles with tectonic fury. Only your knowledge of plate boundaries can stop the shaking!
A swirling storm boss with winds of wrongness! Navigate the eye of confusion and prove you understand atmospheric circulation.
A towering giant fuelled by greenhouse gases. Shrink it down with your knowledge of mitigation and adaptation!
Every strand of the food web connects to this boss. Break one link and the whole ecosystem wobbles. Show you understand the balance!
Ruler of the emergent layer, the Canopy King guards the world's richest biome. Prove your rainforest knowledge to earn safe passage!
From scorching sand dunes to frozen tundra, this boss rules Earth's harshest landscapes. Can you handle both extremes?
This serpentine beast twists and turns through river valleys. Follow its course from source to mouth and you will triumph!
The captain of coastal chaos drifts along the shoreline causing erosion wherever they go. Build your defences and fight back!
Ruling a city of millions is no easy task. The Megacity Mayor challenges you to solve urbanisation's biggest problems!
This boss grows stronger wherever inequality exists. Close the development gap with smart strategies and solid knowledge!
Hoarding the world's food, water and energy, the Resource Raider will not share unless you prove you understand sustainability!
Lost without a map? The Grid Reference Guardian tests your OS skills, data presentation and fieldwork know-how. Plot your way to victory!
